title: Cardiac Diagnostics I
description: ECG fundamentals: 12-lead acquisition, paper measurements, waveform interpretation, and lead anatomy.

lessons.title: 12-Lead ECG & Rhythm Strip
lessons.description: Objective 1.1.1 — Electrode placement, ECG paper measurements, waveform components (P, QRS, T, U), intervals, segments, and the 12 leads with their anatomic views.

resources.title: 12-Lead ECG Placement (video)
resources.description: Step-by-step demonstration of correct limb and chest electrode placement.

resources.title: ECG Interpretation Basics (video)
resources.description: Walkthrough of waveforms, intervals, and segments.

resources.title: 12-Lead ECG Lead Views (video)
resources.description: How each of the 12 leads views the heart in the frontal and horizontal planes.
